{"problem_standardized_math":"If the normal subproblem (19.34a)–(19.34c) is solved using the dogleg method, show that the resulting solution $v$ lies in the range space of the matrix $\\hat A^T$, where\n\\[\n\\begin{bmatrix}\nI & \\hat A^T \\\\\n\\hat A & 0\n\\end{bmatrix},\n\\qquad \\text{with} \\qquad\n\\hat A=\n\\begin{bmatrix}\nA_E(x) & 0 \\\\\nA_I(x) & -S\n\\end{bmatrix}.\n\\tag{19.36}\n\\]"}
